title: Contract verify.commands and read arrays must be perfectly aligned with reality
context: The task required a re-blueprint because the original contract had incorrect test references in verify.commands and the read list.
content: When q-blueprint defines verify.commands, it must ensure the referenced tests either already exist or will be explicitly created during implementation. Pre-existing tests required for verification must be included in the read array so agents have the necessary context.
anti_patterns: Referencing non-existent or hallucinated test files in verify.commands.
Omitting required verification test files from the read array.
